sweep.bulk_phase: 1,915 of 2,005 staff removals in the first five minutes (11:34-11:38), ~6.6 objects/second sustained

rich_html_captures.notes: Rich embedded record JSON (full metadata, creators+affiliations, abstracts, related_identifiers, file inventories with md5 checksums, terminal stats) served on HTML tombstone pages until ~02:00Z 2026-07-12, then absent under all user-agents and via export endpoints; afternoon probe captures of 19013315/20070462/20722680 preserved in session transcript 2026-07-12-01-48-10.
